$metadata.author: Usman Hussain
$metadata.scope: Master registry for all repo-grounded Composer v2 FFETs.
$metadata.title: Phase 6.5 Composer Repo-Grounded Master FFET Registry v2

ffets.title: Import and metadata normalization
ffets.maximum_concrete_capability: Import and metadata normalization: Imported Composer docs have compliant metadata, current source references, and no stale authority citations.
ffets.mcr: Imported Composer docs have compliant metadata, current source references, and no stale authority citations.
stop_conditions: required edit outside exact_files
missing source authority or source claim conflict
schema/migration/package/lockfile/generated/frontend implementation outside active FFET scope
Composer P-ID uses occupied P-26 through P-39
runtime/frontend execution before Gate 3 approval
new business/API/permission/provider/ADL decision not grounded in source
ffets.rollback_notes: Revert the active FFET PR only; do not revert previously merged Phase 6.5 rebaseline artifacts or unrelated user changes.

allowed: deterministic import/export mismatch inside exact files
local test expectation drift caused by active FFET
forbidden: execution flag flips without human Gate 3 approval

expected_evidence: updated closure/audit evidence for active FFET
